# 'gs cc --fill' sets GS_MESSAGE_KIND and GS_MESSAGE_UPDATE
# environment variables for the message generator.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2024-03-30T14:59:32Z'

# setup
cd repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'
gs repo init

git checkout -b feature
gs branch track --base main

# configure a generator that echoes the env vars
git config spice.messageGenerator 'echo "kind=$GS_MESSAGE_KIND update=$GS_MESSAGE_UPDATE"'

# create a commit using --fill
git add foo.txt
gs cc --fill

# verify the env vars were set correctly
git log -1 --format=%s
stdout 'kind=commit update=false'

-- repo/foo.txt --
Contents of foo.
